integrations.title: Project Integrations
integrations.description: Manage integrations and automation rules for this project
integrations.addIntegrationUnavailable: Add integration - unavailable due to loading error
integrations.noIntegrationsDescription: Connect external platforms to automatically create tickets and sync data when bug reports are created.
integrations.integrationRulesDescription: Integration Rules allow you to automatically create tickets in external platforms when bug reports match certain conditions.
integrations.manageRulesDescription: Click "Manage Rules" on any integration to configure filtering, field mappings, throttling, and auto-create settings.
integrations.noFiltersAdded: No filters added yet. Click "Add Filter Condition" to create your first filter. Rules without filters will match all bug reports.

copyRule.title: Copy Rule to Another Project
copyRule.description: Copy "{{name}}" to a different project. The rule will be duplicated with all settings preserved.
copyRule.noteDescription: The copied rule will preserve all settings including auto-create, field mappings, and description templates.

throttleConfig.title: Throttle Configuration
throttleConfig.description: Limit how often tickets are created to prevent spam
throttleConfig.groupByDescription: Group bug reports when counting throttle limits
throttleConfig.digestModeDescription: Batch multiple reports into a single ticket instead of creating individual tickets
throttleConfig.digestIntervalDescription: How often to send digest updates (1-1440 minutes)

createIntegration.title: Create Integration
createIntegration.description: Add a new third-party integration to sync bug reports
createIntegration.basicInformationDescription: Configure the integration name and type
createIntegration.platformIdentifierHelp: Unique identifier for this integration (e.g., my-crm, custom-helpdesk). Use lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only. This cannot be changed later.

genericHttp.nameCannotChange: Name cannot be changed after creation
genericHttp.baseUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (e.g., https://api.example.com)

integrationConfig.noIntegrationTypeProvided: No integration type provided in URL parameters.
integrationConfig.setupCredentials: Set up credentials and settings for this integration
integrationConfig.searchProjectsPlaceholder: Type to filter by key or name…
integrationConfig.noProjectsFound: No projects found. Try a different search or go back and verify your connection.
integrationConfig.autoCreateTickets: Auto-create tickets for new bug reports
integrationConfig.additionalConfigHint: Optional: Add any extra configuration as JSON
integrationConfig.infoConfiguration: Configuration contains non-sensitive settings like URLs and project keys.
integrationConfig.infoCredentials: Credentials are encrypted before being stored in the database and never exposed in API responses.
integrationConfig.infoTestConnection: Click Test Connection to verify your settings before saving.
integrationConfig.ticketContentDescription: Control what data is included in auto-created Jira tickets
integrationConfig.noConfigurationFields: No configuration fields added. Click "Save Configuration" to continue without additional config.

ruleDetailsTab.ruleDescription: A descriptive name to identify this rule in the admin panel
ruleDetailsTab.executionOrderDescription: Higher numbers are evaluated first (e.g., 1000, 800, 600). This determines when the rule runs, not bug priority.
ruleDetailsTab.enabledDescription: Disabled rules will not process any bug reports
ruleDetailsTab.autoCreateDescription: When enabled, matching bug reports will automatically create tickets in {{platform}}. If disabled, tickets must be created manually from the admin panel.
ruleDetailsTab.introBanner: Define the basic settings for this rule. Rules with higher execution order numbers are evaluated first.

conditionsTab.filterDescription: Define conditions to match bug reports. All conditions must be met (AND logic). Leave empty to match all reports.
conditionsTab.introBanner: All conditions use AND logic — every condition must match for the rule to trigger. With no conditions, the rule matches all bug reports.
conditionsTab.fieldHelpPriority: Matches the bug report's priority level (optional field — may be empty on some reports)
conditionsTab.fieldHelpStatus: Matches the bug report's status (open, in_progress, resolved, closed)
conditionsTab.fieldHelpBrowser: Matches the browser name from the user's environment (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
conditionsTab.fieldHelpOs: Matches the operating system (e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android)
conditionsTab.fieldHelpUrlPattern: Matches the page URL where the bug was reported
conditionsTab.fieldHelpErrorMessage: Matches text in the bug report description
conditionsTab.fieldHelpConsoleLevel: Matches if ANY console log entry has this level
conditionsTab.fieldHelpConsoleMessage: Matches if ANY console log entry's message contains this value
conditionsTab.fieldHelpNetworkStatus: Matches if ANY network request returned this HTTP status code (e.g., 404, 500)
conditionsTab.fieldHelpNetworkUrl: Matches if ANY network request URL matches this value
conditionsTab.operatorHelpContains: Value appears anywhere in the field text
conditionsTab.operatorHelpIn: Field value matches any item in the comma-separated list
conditionsTab.operatorHelpNotIn: Field value does not match any item in the list
conditionsTab.operatorHelpStartsWith: Field value begins with this text
conditionsTab.operatorHelpEndsWith: Field value ends with this text
conditionsTab.caseSensitiveHelp: When unchecked, matching ignores letter case (e.g., "Chrome" matches "chrome")

advancedTab.throttlingDescription: Prevent duplicate tickets by limiting how often this rule creates tickets for similar bug reports
advancedTab.introBanner: Throttling prevents duplicate tickets when many similar bug reports arrive in a short time.
advancedTab.suggestedValues: Suggested starting point: 5–10 per hour, 20–50 per day. Adjust based on your ticket volume.
advancedTab.groupByUserHelp: Separate throttle counter per user — limits tickets from each individual reporter
advancedTab.groupByUrlHelp: Separate throttle counter per page URL — useful for page-specific issues
advancedTab.groupByErrorTypeHelp: Separate throttle counter per error signature — best for deduplicating identical errors

fieldMappingsTab.fieldMappingsOnly: Field mappings are only available when automatic ticket creation is enabled.
fieldMappingsTab.enableAutoCreate: Enable "Automatically create tickets" in the Rule Details tab to configure field mappings.
fieldMappingsTab.platformMappingDescription: Map bug report data to {{platform}} ticket fields using template variables
fieldMappingsTab.customDescriptionDescription: Customize the ticket description using Markdown. Preview shows how it will appear in {{platform}}.

integrationRules.title: Integration Rules
integrationRules.configureFiltering: Configure filtering and throttling rules for {{platform}} integration
integrationRules.dialogDescription: Configure filtering conditions and throttling for this integration
integrationRules.noRulesConfigured: No rules configured yet. Create your first rule to start filtering bug reports.
integrationRules.failedToCopyJson: Failed to copy JSON to clipboard

createChannel.title: Create Notification Channel
createChannel.description: Configure a new channel for sending notifications
createChannel.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields

instanceConfiguration.title: Instance Configuration
instanceConfiguration.description: Basic settings for your BugSpotter instance

replayDuration.title: Session Replay Duration
replayDuration.description: Control how many seconds of user activity are captured before a bug report
replayDuration.highMemoryDescription: Durations above {{max}} seconds increase client-side memory usage and may impact browser performance on low-end devices.
replayDuration.durationTradeoffDescription: Longer durations capture more context but increase storage costs and client memory usage. Consider your use case:
replayDuration.duration60: {{max}} seconds: Maximum context, high memory/storage impact

replayQuality.title: Session Replay Quality
replayQuality.description: Control replay visual fidelity and storage costs. Higher fidelity options increase payload size and storage requirements.
replayQuality.inlineStylesheetsDescription: Captures external CSS for accurate styling. Essential for proper replay appearance.
replayQuality.inlineImagesDescription: Embeds images directly in replay data. Ensures images are visible but significantly increases size.
replayQuality.inlineImagesImpact: Impact: +200-500% size (~300KB typical) - expensive storage cost
replayQuality.collectFontsDescription: Includes custom fonts for proper text rendering. Important for brand consistency.
replayQuality.recordCanvasDescription: Captures HTML5 canvas content (charts, games, graphics). Only needed for canvas-heavy applications.
replayQuality.recordCrossOriginIframesDescription: Attempts to record content from embedded iframes. May have privacy and security implications.
replayQuality.performanceTuningDescription: Control event sampling rates to balance replay smoothness with data size. Lower values = more events = larger files.
replayQuality.mouseMovementDescription: Controls how often mouse movements are recorded. Lower values = smoother replay but larger files.
replayQuality.scrollEventDescription: Controls how often scroll events are recorded. Scrolling is less critical than mouse movements.
replayQuality.averageReplaySize: Average replay size with current settings: ~{{size}}KB
replayQuality.highStorageCostDescription: Image inlining can increase replay sizes by 3-5x. Monitor your storage costs carefully.
replayQuality.highStorageCostAdvice: Consider disabling this for production unless visual accuracy is critical for your use case.
replayQuality.recommendationStandard: Standard setup: Enable stylesheets and fonts, disable images
replayQuality.recommendationHighFidelity: High fidelity: Add images only if visual accuracy is critical
replayQuality.recommendationCanvas: Canvas recording: Only for apps with charts, games, or graphics

featureSettings.title: Feature Flags
featureSettings.sessionReplayDescription: Enable session replay recording for bug reports

table.rotateDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to rotate this API key? The old key will be immediately revoked and a new key will be generated. You'll need to update any applications using the old key.

settings.autoEnrichDescription: Automatically enrich new bug reports with AI-generated summary, severity, and tags
